prompt: You're in a skills repository. A user says: "Tighten the feature-dev skill so it only triggers for medium-to-large feature work, add a short 'When not to use this skill' section, and make sure implementation always requires tdd, uses code-simplifier in a subagent for refactoring, and runs quality review in an independent subagent. Inspect the current skill and tell me exactly how you'd make the change. Only ask questions if something is truly blocking."
assertions: References the existing feature-dev skill directly rather than answering generically.
Avoids asking blocking clarifying questions for this well-specified task.
Proposes concrete description and body changes, including a scoped 'When not to use this skill' addition.
Scales the workflow to the task instead of insisting on a full multi-phase approval process.
Explicitly requires tdd for implementation, code-simplifier as a subagent for refactoring review, and independent subagent-based quality review.
